name: @rune-langium/codegen-container
description: Legacy Cloudflare Container image (Java 21 + rosetta-code-generators + Node HTTP wrapper) — the JVM backend behind the legacy rune-codegen-worker (feature 011-export-code-cf). Superseded by the Langium-native @rune-langium/codegen in the studio's /api/codegen Pages Function. Retained for reference and NOT deployed in prod.

scripts.package: pnpm run build:bundle && pnpm run build:docker
scripts.publish: pnpm run package && wrangler containers push rune-codegen:latest

author: Pradeep Mouli <pmouli@mac.com> (https://github.com/pradeepmouli)
